project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: S/L retrieved IVC, ran 3.6" drift, tagged HUD @1861ft. DFA crane still down. 5/16" Eline cable on DFB. Once DFA crane is repaired, need to wait for a boat to transport the cable from DFB to DFA. READ kit on board DFB late yesterday afternoon. Plan today: string check tools in memory mode. Timing for MFC run TBC.

project: PRJ03259 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9895 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: During Shut in survey the ILS and DBT were reading zero( suspected clogged) toolstring was unable to tractor in hole at around 5012m, decision made to inject the well. after about 20 mins, spinners started to respond. attempted to tracxtor in hole but now cannot pass rss#6 at 5487m. waiting on decision from KPO how to proceed.

project: PRJ03160 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GBN12 (N-12)_GBN43 (N-43) - MFC_ ZeroTime
comment: Equipment expected to arrive onboard tomorrow.

project: PRJ03259 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9895 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Once we reached surface the SRO string was removed and found that there was no voltage on bottom of tractor during lwt. switched out tractor electronics and function test all ok. umt re- programed and battery on at 10:10. start to RIH at 12:25

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Rigged up S/L and pressure tested PCE. Ops on standby due to faulty S/L weight indicator. Boat with READ kit expected today, to be loaded on the B platform, as A platform crane is non operational - also means Slb 5/16 eline cable required for milling can't be brought on board yet. MFC timing TBC but well after 29th June.
